class=\"can-be-empty style-scope ytd-shelf-renderer\">Fretboard Memorization Course | Learning The Fretboard On Guitar\n\nEyup folks! This playlist will hopefully become an awesome resource if you're trying to learn the guitar fretboard note. \n\nThere are MANY routes to mastering fretboard memorization. The aim of this playlist is to give you as many perspectives into the various common and not so common methods to achieve fretboard mastery.\n\nThe guitar fretboard has a beautiful and elegant framework. Until you learn the fretboard you will never master the guitar.\n\nYou will forever be groping around the same old licks and shapes you've been boring yourself with for years.\n\nRegardless of genre, this easy to follow series of videos reveal an absolute method for total fretboard control. This, in turn, will unleash the master musician within you and enable you to speak in your own authentic voice on the guitar.\n\nThat is something truly beautiful.</yt-formatted-string>\n  </div>\n
